spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 3 of 4 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Most of the blurb's promises land but a few of the named behaviours aren't shown.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is covered but only a few failure modes are surfaced.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Has 4 raw hex colour value(s) inline — should use --bg-*/--text-*/--accent-* tokens instead.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct browser recheck loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Probes the exact geometry and computed-style methods before selecting native CSSPseudoElement output. Fresh targeted validation passed.
